testcase.name: Test

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (748, 241). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.103) Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039bd14*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [e5812d76096f8a7b7c6e20ff75e3c526, clickElement {id=f.632A687ADA3DFEC0A805284D51EF55A6.d.03589700EC5B40D0A516D774573D7677.e.742}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.103, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.115 (daf70f9ddee..., userDataDir: C:\Users\DEVANS~1.BAJ\AppDa...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49832}, goog:processID: 3316, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49832/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.103, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (e5812d76096f8a7b7c6e20ff75e3c526)] -> id: ddate] Session ID: e5812d76096f8a7b7c6e20ff75e3c526
